title: Capture realized provider token usage in the ledger (REQ-H3)
description: Record provider-reported inputTokens/outputTokens (already returned by the LLM adapters) into the cost ledger, replacing chars/4 for realized usage; keep estimateTokens as a pre-flight estimate only. SCOPE: capture only — dollar math + rollups are P4, do not implement them here. Spec: REQ-H3.
